scripts.version:all:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/server && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/web
scripts.version:all:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/server && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/web
scripts.version:all:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/server && npm version major --no-git-tag-version --prefix apps/web
